name: AWS IAM Successful Creation of a Role
description: Detects the successful creation of a new IAM role, which may be part of normal operations but is important to monitor, as in worst-case scenarios it could indicate an attacker creating a backdoor account to maintain persistent unauthorized access in the AWS environment.

filterSets.name: AWS IAM Successful Creation of a Role

author: Yash Verma & Christopher Ordonez
